category_sources: Official Fly.io docs include flyctl installation and CLI reference documentation.
source_facts.description says it provides command-line tools for fly.io services.
display_name_sources: Official Fly.io docs refer to installing flyctl.
source_facts.name is flyctl and source_facts.executables include flyctl and fly.
docs_sources: Official Fly.io developer documentation is the broader documentation site for the service controlled by flyctl.
Official Fly.io docs include the flyctl CLI reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/superfly/flyctl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Fly.io docs show flyctl as the CLI used to launch and manage Fly.io apps.
